docs:
# Scroll Progress
A viewport-bound progress indicator that tracks page scroll.
## Import
```tsx
import { ScrollProgress } from "@/components/ui/scroll-progress";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<ScrollProgress panelHeight={360} brand={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **panelHeight** (number) — default: `360`: Panel height
- **brand** (string): Brand
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add scroll-progress
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/scroll-progress
```
